prose: **Furan HOMO–LUMO gap (frontier orbitals)** — DFT, tier 'standard' (**B3LYP/def2-TZVP**, density fitting) in PySCF, **gas phase**, charge 0, multiplicity 1. Command: `cli.py frontier --method dft --tier standard --charge 0 --mult 1 --solvent none furan.xyz`.
